violations.text: The gaskets of the doors in the seafood case and the healthy foods/hummus case were observed to be torn/missing. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The following was observed: 1) The fans in the seafood prep area was observed with dust 2) The produce case was observed with residue on the honeycomb vents 3) The back deli case was observed with a black residue on the honeycomb vents 4) Tape residue was observed on clean pans 5) The dairy cooler fans were observed with an accumulation of dust 6) Ice buildup was observed on the pipes in the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The following was observed: 1) The ceiling of the dairy walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust 2) The floors under the racks of the dairy walk-in were observed with an accumulation of food and other debris 3) The wall of the dairy walk-in was observed with an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm) in the deli and meat areas. According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer was manually mixed at the time of inspection to be 200ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The following was observed of non-food contact surfaces: 1) the grates along the freezer section observed with debris 2) The honeycomb vents in the produce shelving area observed with biofilm 3) The door lift of the ice machine observed with biofilm 4) The fan cover in the seafood prep area observed with dust New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the crates used for food storage at the cheese cutting area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
